[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110010 3
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 1000000 1
6 0010101 3
7 0110000 2

01 10 0001000 1
12 21 0000001 1
23 32 0010001 2
34 43 0000000 a match 1 2 3 4
45 54 1000000 1 match 5
56 65 0010100 2
67 76 0110010 3 match 0
70 07 0000000 a match 1 2 3 4
